cleavage agent: samples were incubated overnight with 2 µg trypsin (Trypsin Gold, Promega, USA)
collision energy: mass spectrometer (Q-Exactive HF, ThermoScientific, Germany) which was operated in data-dependent mode.
fragmentation method: the mass spectrometer (Q-Exactive HF, ThermoScientific, Germany) which was operated in data-dependent mode.
instrument: the mass spectrometer (Q-Exactive HF, ThermoScientific, Germany)
